scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names server,client "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names server,client "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev -- --host"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter client test --if-present
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.desktop:dev: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --prefix desktop run dev
scripts.desktop:dist: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --prefix desktop run dist
scripts.desktop:dist:win: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --prefix desktop run dist:win
